# EXTERNAL — Externalization Governance

## When

Use Thursday, or whenever a front needs to leave the private system.

## Purpose

Convert internal work into contact, publication, feedback, delivery, or opportunity.

## Inputs

- Draft/artifact
- Contact or publication target
- Message context
- Output log if used
- Enough quality for the intended recipient

## Steps minimum

1. Choose one external surface.
2. Decide send/publish/contact/feedback.
3. Prepare minimal final version.
4. Send or publish.
5. Log evidence if useful.

## Output

An external surface changed.

## Tick valid when

Something was actually sent, published, shared, requested, or delivered.

## Stop rule

Do not keep polishing when the artifact is already good enough for the recipient.
